title: Choose account settings
setting_description: Depending on your country of residence, you have the option to choose the website where you can contract and select your products. The billing currency will also be linked to the chosen website.
setting_description_list_first: 1. If you are a VAT, GST, or similar tax registered customer, your country of residence corresponds to the country in which you are registered.
setting_description_list_second: 2. If you are a non-VAT, GST, or similar tax registered customer but are registered as an 'entrepreneur', your country of residence corresponds to the country in which you are registered as an entrepreneur (tax identification number).
setting_description_list_last: 3. If you are a non-VAT, GST, or similar tax registered customer, your country of residence generally corresponds to that of your billing address. In accordance with applicable legislation, OVH may need to cross-reference this information with that of your IP address or the banking domicile of your payment method. In case of a discrepancy, OVH may contact you to validate your country of residence.
